mechanism: Lithium input pricing and availability influence battery pack cost and therefore EV and storage gross margin.
why_connected: Battery input costs and supply availability affect Tesla vehicle and storage unit economics.

mechanism: Global auto demand, financing conditions, and price competition shape Tesla volume and ASP outcomes.
why_connected: Tesla's core revenue base is still tied to the broader automotive market.

mechanism: EV adoption, incentives, and competition directly affect Tesla growth and market share.
why_connected: Tesla growth is highly sensitive to EV adoption curves and competitor pricing.

mechanism: Megapack deployments and grid storage demand drive Tesla Energy growth optionality.
why_connected: Stationary storage is a major adjacent growth vector for Tesla.

mechanism: FSD capability and robotaxi viability influence long-duration valuation narrative.
why_connected: Autonomy expectations are central to Tesla's optionality case.

mechanism: Optimus ties Tesla's AI and manufacturing stack to a longer-dated robotics thesis.
why_connected: Humanoid robotics is a long-duration optionality narrative around Tesla AI.

mechanism: Supercharger density and reliability affect EV adoption, brand loyalty, and service revenue.
why_connected: Charging infrastructure supports the ecosystem moat.

mechanism: Panasonic remains a historical and strategic battery-cell supplier and partner.
why_connected: Battery supply relationship affects cost, capacity, and chemistry mix.

mechanism: CATL is a major industry benchmark and supplier reference for cost and chemistry.

mechanism: LG Energy Solution contributes to battery supply diversification.
why_connected: Battery supplier diversification affects scale and execution risk.

mechanism: BYD competes on EV volume, pricing, and battery integration.

mechanism: AI compute availability and economics matter for autonomy model training and inference.

mechanism: Leadership decisions, public communication, governance posture, and capital-market narrative materially influence Tesla.
